zh.Randolph, North Carolina, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州蘭多夫
zh.Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克
zh.North Carolina, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州
zh.lifeSummary: William John Diffee於1685年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州。他於1705年與Mary Bigelow在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州蘭多夫享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William John Diffee于1685年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州。他于1705年与Mary Bigelow在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1765年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Diffee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Diffey  . Compare   Defee  .

History: William Diffee, from whom present-day American bearers of this name are descended, was born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, and died in 1790 in Randolph County, NC. His surname was also spelled Diffey, while his descendants also bear the surname Defee .

variants.name: Diffey
meanings: English (Dorset): perhaps a nickname from Anglo-Norman French defaé, defieu ‘faithless, disloyal’. Compare Diffee .

variants.name: Defee
meanings: History: This surname is borne by the descendants of William Diffee, born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, died 1790 in Randolph County, NC. The same spelling is recorded in London, England, in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: William John Diffee was born in 1685, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. He married Mary Bigelow in 1705, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1765, in Randolph, North Carolina, British Colonial America, at the age of 80.

ja.lifeSummary: William John Diffeeは1685年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州で生まれた。1705年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州でMary Bigelowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1765年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ランドルフで80歳で死去した。

ko.Randolph, North Carolina, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프
ko.Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크
ko.lifeSummary: William John Diffee(은)는 1685년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났다. 그는 1705년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Mary Bigelow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1765년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Randolph, North Carolina, British Coloni: рандолф, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: William John Diffee родился в 1685 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bigelow в 1705 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1765 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет.
